title: Insecure Direct Object Reference Detected
description: Detects IDOR (Insecure Direct Object Reference) attacks where users access resources belonging to other users by manipulating object IDs in URLs. OWASP A01:2021 Broken Access Control.
query: ('Log Source' = 'SOC Web Application Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'OCI Load Balancer Access Logs') and (('Attack Type' = 'IDOR') or ('OWASP Category' like '*Broken Access Control*'))
falsepositives: Admin users legitimately accessing other user profiles
